tasks.completion_summary: JobObjectWatchdog + stdin-EOF + -c ExpandAliases parity. Also closed dSIX4qP7DtFG and j19Y46rA74c2. Commit ab1f75e.
ProcessRunHelper extracted; all E2E spawns now use 30s timeout + Kill(entireProcessTree:true) in finally. Added HangingCommand tests in both E2E files — verified pass in 12s, no leaked workers.

Runspace parent-watcher injected BEFORE module bootstrap in both worker paths (scripts/ps-bash-worker.ps1 top + PwshWorker.BuildInitScript top). Defense-in-depth for when Job Object attach fails or on non-Windows. Regression test WorkerExits_WhenParentDiesDuringBootstrap passes. All ProcessLifecycle (4) + HangingCommand (2) tests green.
